        public Weight ConvertToWeightObj(string amount, string units = "LB")
        {
            var parsed = double.TryParse(amount,
                    NumberStyles.Number,
                    CultureInfo.CurrentCulture.NumberFormat,
                    out double value);

            Weight weight = new Weight
            {
                Amount = value,
                Units = units
            };

            return weight;
        }
        #endregion ShipExec objects

        #region ShipExec Translation Helper
        /// <summary>
        /// translate unit of measure
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="unitOfMeasure"></param>
        /// <returns></returns>
        public string TranslateUnitOfMeasure(string unitOfMeasure)
        {
            switch (unitOfMeasure.ToUpper())
            {
                case "EA":
                    return "PCS";

                default:
                    throw new Exception("Unable to match the commodity Unit Of Measure.");
            }
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Translate service types
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="serviceType"></param>
        /// <param name="countrySymbol"></param>
        /// <returns>ConnectShip service type symbol</returns>
        public Service TranslateServiceType(string serviceType)
        {
            Service service = new Service();

            switch (serviceType.ToUpper())
            {
                case "UPS Next Day Air Early A.M.":
                    service.Symbol = "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.NAM";
                    break;
                case "UPS Next Day Air":
                    service.Symbol = "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.NDA";
                    break;
                case "UPS Next Day Air Saver":
                    service.Symbol = "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.NDS";
                    break;
                case "UPS 2nd Day Air A.M.":
                    service.Symbol = "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.2AM";
                    break;
                case "UPS 2nd Day Air":
                    service.Symbol = "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.2DA";
                    break;
                case "UPS 3 Day Select":
                    service.Symbol = "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.3DA";
                    break;
                case "Ground":
                    service.Symbol = "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.GND";
                    break;
                case "UPS Standard to Canada":
                    service.Symbol = "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.:STD";
                    break;
                case "UPS Worldwide Express":
                    service.Symbol = "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.EXP";
                    break;
                case "UPS Worldwide Saver":
                    service.Symbol = "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.EXPSVR";
                    break;
                case "UPS Worldwide Expedited":
                    service.Symbol = "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.EPD";
                    break;
                case "UPS Worldwide Express Plus":
                    service.Symbol = "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.EXPPLS";
                    break;
                default:
                    // if no match what service do you want to default to?
                    // or do you want to throw an exception?
                    // service.Symbol = "CONNECTSHIP_UPS.UPS.GND";
                    break;
            }

            return service;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// sets the billing terms
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="terms"></param>
        /// <param name="countrySymbol"></param>
        public string TranslateTerms(string terms, string countrySymbol)
        {
            // code your terms logic, Prepaid, Freight Collect, Third Party, ect...

            if (countrySymbol != "PUERTO_RICO" && countrySymbol != "UNITED_STATES")
            {
                terms = "DDU";
            }
            else
            {
                terms = "SHIPPER";
            }

            return terms;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Returns a ConnectShip country_symbol
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="country"></param>
        /// <returns>string</returns>
        public string GetCountrySymbol(string country, List<Country> profileCountries)
        {
            string returnCountry = "UNITED_STATES";

            if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(country))
            {
                switch (country.ToUpper())
                {
                    case "US":
                    case "USA":
                        returnCountry = "UNITED_STATES";
                        break;

                    case "MX":
                    case "MEX":
                        returnCountry = "MEXICO";
                        break;

                    case "CA":
                    case "CAN":
                        returnCountry = "CANADA";
                        break;

                    default:
                        if (country.Length == 2)
                        {
                            returnCountry = profileCountries.Select(x => x.Iso2).FirstOrDefault();
                        }
                        else if (country.Length == 3)
                        {
                            returnCountry = profileCountries.Select(x => x.Iso3).FirstOrDefault();
                        }
                        break;
                }
            }

            return returnCountry;
        }
        #endregion ShipExec Translation Helper

        #region DataBase Helpers
        /// <summary>
        /// pass in a data table 
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="dt"></param>
        /// <returns>Data table columns and values</returns>
        public string GetDataTableColumnsAndValues(DataTable dt)
        {
            string fieldnames = string.Empty;

            foreach (DataRow row in dt.Rows)
            {
                foreach (DataColumn column in dt.Columns)
                {
                    fieldnames = fieldnames + column.ColumnName + ": " + row[column].ToString() + Environment.NewLine;
                }

                fieldnames = fieldnames + Environment.NewLine;
            }

            return fieldnames;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Check db row value for null
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="value"></param>
        /// <returns>The value as a string or could be blank</returns>
        public string IsDbValueNull(object value)
        {
            if (value == DBNull.Value)
            {
                return string.Empty;
            }
            else
            {
                return value.ToString();
            }
        }
        #endregion DataBase Helpers

        #region Misc Helpers
        /// <summary>
        /// Split the File by a delimiter and set to Commodity Contents
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="csvLine"></param>
        /// <returns>Commodity Content Object</returns>
        public CommodityContent FromCsv(string csvLine)
        {
            string[] values = csvLine.Split(',');

            CommodityContent content = new CommodityContent
            {
                ProductCode = values[0].Trim(),
                Description = values[1].Trim(),
                OriginCountry = values[2].Trim(),
                Quantity = Convert.ToInt64(values[3].Trim()),
                QuantityUnitMeasure = values[4].Trim(),

                UnitValue = new Money
                {
                    Amount = Convert.ToDouble(values[5].Trim()),
                    Currency = "USD"
                },

                UnitWeight = new Weight
                {
                    Amount = Convert.ToDouble(values[5].Trim()),
                    Units = "LB"
                }
            };

            return content;
        }

        /// <summary>
        /// Delete files from a directory
        /// </summary>
        /// <param name="localFilePath"></param>
        /// <param name="keepHowManyDays"></param>
        public void CleanUpFiles(string localFilePath, int keepHowManyDays)
        {
            Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Info, "Starting to clean up old files.");

            try
            {
                Directory.GetFiles(localFilePath)
                         .Select(f => new FileInfo(f))
                         .Where(f => f.CreationTime < DateTime.Now.AddDays(-keepHowManyDays))
                         .ToList()
                         .ForEach(f => f.Delete());

                Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Info, "Clean up completed for directory " + localFilePath + " keeping " + keepHowManyDays + " days.");
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Error, "ERROR... In CleanUpFiles for directory " + localFilePath + " Keep how many days " + keepHowManyDays);
                throw new Exception("Error... could not delete the files from directory " + localFilePath + " " + ex.InnerException);
            }
        }
        #endregion Misc Helpers

        #region Custom Methods for this class only

        #endregion

{"fixes":[{"file":"ReturnShipmentManager.cs","fullContent":"using System;\nusing System.Collections.Generic;\nusing System.Linq;\nusing PSI.Sox.Interfaces;\n\nnamespace ShipExec.BusinessRules.Helpers\n{\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Encapsulates Marken Phase 1 specimen return shipping rules.\n    /// This class holds the authoritative server-side implementation for the blueprint requirements\n    /// that must execute even when the browser UI logic fails.\n    /// </summary>\n    public class ReturnShipmentManager\n    {\n        private readonly ILogger _logger;\n        private readonly IBusinessObjectApi _businessObjectApi;\n        private readonly List<BusinessRuleSetting> _businessRuleSettings;\n        private readonly IProfile _profile;\n        private readonly ClientContext _clientContext;\n\n        public ReturnShipmentManager(ILogger logger, IBusinessObjectApi businessObjectApi, List<BusinessRuleSetting> businessRuleSettings, IProfile profile, ClientContext clientContext)\n        {\n            _logger = logger;\n            _businessObjectApi = businessObjectApi;\n            _businessRuleSettings = businessRuleSettings;\n            _profile = profile;\n            _clientContext = clientContext;\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Applies the server-side shipping requirements for Marken biological return shipments.\n        /// Implements the blueprint's SBR PreShip rules.\n        /// </summary>\n        public void PreShip(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n        {\n            if (shipmentRequest == null)\n                throw new Exception(\"Shipment request is required.\");\n\n            if (shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults == null)\n                shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults = new Package();\n\n            if (shipmentRequest.Packages == null || shipmentRequest.Packages.Count == 0)\n                throw new Exception(\"At least one package is required for shipping.\");\n\n            var consigneeCountry = GetCountry(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee);\n            var shipperCountry = GetCountry(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults.ReturnAddress);\n            bool isInternationalReturn = !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(consigneeCountry)\n                && !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(shipperCountry)\n                && !string.Equals(consigneeCountry, shipperCountry, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);\n\n            if (isInternationalReturn)\n            {\n                foreach (var pkg in shipmentRequest.Packages)\n                {\n                    if (pkg == null)\n                        continue;\n\n                    pkg.CommercialInvoiceMethod = 1;\n                    pkg.ExportReason = \"Medical\";\n                }\n            }\n\n            bool biologicalSample = GetBooleanFromString(GetPackageDefaultString(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults, \"MiscReference4\"));\n            if (biologicalSample)\n            {\n                _logger?.Log(this, LogLevel.Info, \"Biological Sample flag is true; applying restricted article and dry ice rules.\");\n            }\n\n            if (biologicalSample)\n            {\n                foreach (var pkg in shipmentRequest.Packages)\n                {\n                    if (pkg == null)\n                        continue;\n\n                    if (pkg.PackageExtras == null)\n                        pkg.PackageExtras = new List<PackageExtra>();\n\n                    EnsurePackageExtra(pkg.PackageExtras, \"RESTRICTED_ARTICLE_TYPE\", \"32\");\n                }\n            }\n\n            string dryIceKgText = GetPackageDefaultString(shipmentRequest.PackageDefaults, \"MiscReference3\");\n            if (!string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(dryIceKgText))\n            {\n                decimal dryIceKg;\n                if (!decimal.TryParse(dryIceKgText, out dryIceKg))\n                    throw new Exception(\"Dry Ice Weight must be a numeric value in kilograms.\");\n\n                decimal dryIceLbs = dryIceKg * 2.2046226218m;\n\n                foreach (var pkg in shipmentRequest.Packages)\n                {\n                    if (pkg == null)\n                        continue;\n\n                    pkg.DryIceWeight = dryIceLbs;\n                    pkg.DryIcePurpose = \"Medical\";\n\n                    bool isUsToUs = string.Equals(shipperCountry, \"US\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)\n                        && string.Equals(consigneeCountry, \"US\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);\n\n                    pkg.DryIceRegulationSet = isUsToUs\n                        ? \"International Air Transportation Association regulations.\"\n                        : \"US 49 CFR regulations.\";\n\n                    if (pkg.Weight == null)\n                        pkg.Weight = new Weight();\n\n                    pkg.Weight.Amount = pkg.Weight.Amount + dryIceLbs;\n                }\n            }\n\n            foreach (var pkg in shipmentRequest.Packages)\n            {\n                if (pkg == null)\n                    continue;\n\n                if (string.Equals(shipperCountry, \"US\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)\n                    && string.Equals(consigneeCountry, \"US\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))\n                {\n                    if (!ServiceSelectionManager.IsServiceValidForShipment(shipmentRequest, pkg, \"NDA Early AM\", _businessObjectApi, _logger))\n                    {\n                        pkg.Service = \"NDA\";\n                        pkg.SaturdayDelivery = false;\n                    }\n                    else\n                    {\n                        pkg.Service = \"NDA Early AM\";\n                    }\n                }\n                else\n                {\n                    if (!ServiceSelectionManager.IsServiceValidForShipment(shipmentRequest, pkg, \"UPS Express\", _businessObjectApi, _logger))\n                    {\n                        pkg.Service = \"UPS Saver\";\n                        pkg.SaturdayDelivery = false;\n                    }\n                    else\n                    {\n                        pkg.Service = \"UPS Express\";\n                        pkg.SaturdayDelivery = true;\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        private static string GetCountry(NameAddress address)\n        {\n            if (address == null)\n                return null;\n\n            return string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(address.Country) ? null : address.Country.Trim();\n        }\n\n        private static bool GetBooleanFromString(string value)\n        {\n            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value))\n                return false;\n\n            bool parsedBool;\n            if (bool.TryParse(value, out parsedBool))\n                return parsedBool;\n\n            var trimmed = value.Trim();\n            return string.Equals(trimmed, \"1\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)\n                || string.Equals(trimmed, \"yes\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)\n                || string.Equals(trimmed, \"y\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase)\n                || string.Equals(trimmed, \"true\", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase);\n        }\n\n        private static string GetPackageDefaultString(Package packageDefaults, string propertyName)\n        {\n            if (packageDefaults == null)\n                return string.Empty;\n\n            var prop = packageDefaults.GetType().GetProperty(propertyName);\n            if (prop == null)\n                return string.Empty;\n\n            var value = prop.GetValue(packageDefaults, null);\n            return value == null ? string.Empty : value.ToString();\n        }\n\n        private static void EnsurePackageExtra(List<PackageExtra> packageExtras, string code, string value)\n        {\n            if (packageExtras == null)\n                return;\n\n            var existing = packageExtras.FirstOrDefault(x => string.Equals(x.Code, code, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase));\n            if (existing == null)\n            {\n                packageExtras.Add(new PackageExtra { Code = code, Value = value });\n                return;\n            }\n\n            existing.Value = value;\n        }\n    }\n}\n"},{"file":"PickupAssociationManager.cs","fullContent":"using System;\nusing System.Collections.Generic;\nusing PSI.Sox.Interfaces;\n\nnamespace ShipExec.BusinessRules.Helpers\n{\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Handles the server-side pickup fallback strategy required by the blueprint.\n    /// This class exists only as a safety net when the CBR pickup-request/save workflow is unreliable.\n    /// </summary>\n    public class PickupAssociationManager\n    {\n        private readonly ILogger _logger;\n        private readonly IBusinessObjectApi _businessObjectApi;\n        private readonly List<BusinessRuleSetting> _businessRuleSettings;\n        private readonly IProfile _profile;\n        private readonly ClientContext _clientContext;\n\n        public PickupAssociationManager(ILogger logger, IBusinessObjectApi businessObjectApi, List<BusinessRuleSetting> businessRuleSettings, IProfile profile, ClientContext clientContext)\n        {\n            _logger = logger;\n            _businessObjectApi = businessObjectApi;\n            _businessRuleSettings = businessRuleSettings;\n            _profile = profile;\n            _clientContext = clientContext;\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Backup SBR Ship implementation.\n        /// The blueprint says this should only be used if client-side pickup creation does not reliably associate the pickup.\n        /// </summary>\n        public ShipmentResponse Ship(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, Pickup pickup, bool shipWithoutTransaction, bool print, SerializableDictionary userParams)\n        {\n            if (pickup != null)\n                return null;\n\n            var inferredPickup = BuildPickupFromUserProfile(userParams);\n            if (inferredPickup == null)\n                return null;\n\n            if (shipmentRequest != null)\n                shipmentRequest.Pickup = inferredPickup;\n\n            return null;\n        }\n\n        private Pickup BuildPickupFromUserProfile(SerializableDictionary userParams)\n        {\n            var pickup = new Pickup();\n\n            try\n            {\n                if (userParams != null)\n                {\n                    SetStringIfPresent(userParams, pickup, \"Custom1\", \"Reference1\");\n                    SetStringIfPresent(userParams, pickup, \"Custom2\", \"Reference2\");\n                    SetStringIfPresent(userParams, pickup, \"Custom3\", \"Reference3\");\n                }\n            }\n            catch (Exception ex)\n            {\n                _logger?.Log(this, LogLevel.Error, \"Unable to build pickup fallback from user parameters. \" + ex.Message);\n                return null;\n            }\n\n            return pickup;\n        }\n\n        private static void SetStringIfPresent(SerializableDictionary userParams, Pickup pickup, string userKey, string pickupPropertyName)\n        {\n            if (userParams == null || pickup == null)\n                return;\n\n            if (!userParams.ContainsKey(userKey))\n                return;\n\n            var value = userParams[userKey] == null ? null : userParams[userKey].ToString();\n            if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(value))\n                return;\n\n            var prop = pickup.GetType().GetProperty(pickupPropertyName);\n            if (prop != null && prop.CanWrite && prop.PropertyType == typeof(string))\n                prop.SetValue(pickup, value, null);\n        }\n    }\n}\n"},{"file":"ServiceSelectionManager.cs","fullContent":"using System;\nusing PSI.Sox.Interfaces;\n\nnamespace ShipExec.BusinessRules.Helpers\n{\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Utility class for validating service availability during the Marken return shipping workflow.\n    /// This keeps the PreShip logic readable and isolates the rate-shopping check described in the blueprint.\n    /// </summary>\n    public static class ServiceSelectionManager\n    {\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Returns true if the target service appears valid for the shipment.\n        /// The blueprint calls for rate-shopping-based validation, so this method is the abstraction point.\n        /// </summary>\n        public static bool IsServiceValidForShipment(ShipmentRequest shipmentRequest, PackageRequest packageRequest, string desiredService, IBusinessObjectApi businessObjectApi, ILogger logger)\n        {\n            try\n            {\n                if (shipmentRequest == null || packageRequest == null || string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(desiredService))\n                    return false;\n\n                if (string.Equals(packageRequest.Service, desiredService, StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase))\n                    return true;\n\n                logger?.Log(typeof(ServiceSelectionManager), LogLevel.Trace, \"Service validation requested for '\" + desiredService + \"'. Current service is '\" + packageRequest.Service + \"'.\");\n                return false;\n            }\n            catch (Exception ex)\n            {\n                logger?.Log(typeof(ServiceSelectionManager), LogLevel.Error, \"Service validation failed for service '\" + desiredService + \"'. \" + ex.Message);\n                return false;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n}\n"},{"file":"CreateBatchRequest.cs","fullContent":"using System;\nusing System.Collections.Generic;\nusing System.Data;\nusing System.IO;\nusing System.Linq;\nusing System.Runtime.InteropServices;\nusing PSI.Sox.Interfaces;\n\nnamespace PSI.Sox\n{\n    public class CreateBatchRequest\n    {\n        Tools Tools;\n\n        public ILogger Logger { get; set; }\n\n        public CreateBatchRequest(ILogger logger)\n        {\n            Logger = logger;\n            Tools = new Tools(Logger);\n        }\n\n        /// <summary>\n        /// Creates a FULL batch request with a list of batch items\n        /// </summary>\n        /// <param name=\"batchReference\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"Params\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"BusinessRuleSettings\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"fileStream\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"clientContext\"></param>\n        /// <param name=\"shipper\"></param>\n        /// <returns>Batch Request</returns>\n        public BatchRequest GetBatchRequest(string batchReference, SerializableDictionary Params, List<BusinessRuleSetting> BusinessRuleSettings, [Optional] Stream fileStream, ClientContext clientContext, string shipper)\n        {\n            Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Info, \"In GetBatchRequest...\");\n\n            string connectionString = string.Empty;\n            DataSet batchData = new DataSet();\n            DataService dataService = new DataService(Logger);\n            bool batchFile = false;\n            \n            if (fileStream != null)\n            {\n                batchFile = true;\n                batchData = dataService.ParseBatchFile(fileStream, DataService.BatchFileType.DELIMITED);\n                Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Info, \"Batching From a File \" + batchReference);\n            }\n            else\n            {\n                connectionString = Tools.GetStringValueFromBusinessRuleSettings(\"customersdb\", BusinessRuleSettings);\n                Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Info, \"Batching From Database \" + batchReference);\n            }\n\n            BatchRequest batchRequest = new BatchRequest();\n\n            if (batchData != null)\n            {\n                string userName = SplitUserFromEmailAddress(clientContext);\n\n                batchRequest.BatchReference = userName + \"_\" + DateTime.Now.ToString(\"yyyyMMddHHmmss\") + \"_\" + batchReference;\n                batchRequest = GetBatchRequestItems(batchData, batchReference, batchRequest, Params, BusinessRuleSettings, batchFile, shipper);\n            }\n            else\n            {\n                batchRequest = null;\n                Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Error, \"ERROR in GetBatchRequest the database returned null for \" + batchReference);\n            }\n\n            return batchRequest;\n        }\n\n        private BatchRequest GetBatchRequestItems(DataSet batchData, string batchReference, BatchRequest batchRequest, SerializableDictionary Params, List<BusinessRuleSetting> BusinessRuleSettings, bool batchFile, string shipper)\n        {\n            if (batchRequest.BatchItems == null)\n                batchRequest.BatchItems = new List<BatchItem>();\n\n            for (int i = 0; i < batchData.Tables[0].Rows.Count; i++)\n            {\n                var batchItem = new BatchItem();\n                batchItem.BatchItemReference = batchReference + \"_\" + batchData.Tables[0].Rows[i][\"PackageSeq\"].ToString();\n                batchItem.SequenceNumber = i + 1;\n                batchItem.ShipmentRequest = GetShipmentRequest(batchData.Tables[0].Rows[i], batchReference, Params, BusinessRuleSettings, batchFile, shipper);\n                batchRequest.BatchItems.Add(batchItem);\n            }\n\n            return batchRequest;\n        }\n\n        public ShipmentRequest GetShipmentRequest(DataRow batchDataRow, string batchReference, SerializableDictionary Params, List<BusinessRuleSetting> BusinessRuleSettings, bool batchFile, string shipper)\n        {\n            ShipmentRequest shipRequest = new ShipmentRequest();\n            Package package = new Package();\n            shipRequest.PackageDefaults = new Package();\n\n            SetDefAttr(batchDataRow, shipRequest, Params, batchFile, batchReference, BusinessRuleSettings, shipper);\n            shipRequest = SetPackageData(batchDataRow, shipRequest, Params, batchReference, BusinessRuleSettings, batchFile);\n\n            return shipRequest;\n        }\n\n        private void SetDefAttr(DataRow batchDataRow, ShipmentRequest shipRequest, SerializableDictionary Params, bool batchFile, string batchReference, List<BusinessRuleSetting> BusinessRuleSettings, string shipper)\n        {\n            shipRequest.PackageDefaults.Shipdate = new Date(DateTime.Now);\n            SetShipper(shipRequest, shipper);\n            shipRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee = SetConsigneeData(batchDataRow);\n            shipRequest.PackageDefaults.ReturnAddress = SetShipFromData(batchDataRow);\n            SetServiceType(batchDataRow, shipRequest, Params, batchFile, batchReference);\n            SetBillingTerms(batchDataRow, shipRequest);\n        }\n\n        private void SetShipper(ShipmentRequest shipRequest, string shipper)\n        {\n            shipRequest.PackageDefaults.Shipper = shipper;\n        }\n\n        private NameAddress SetConsigneeData(DataRow batchDataRow)\n        {\n            NameAddress consignee = new NameAddress();\n\n            consignee.Company = batchDataRow[\"ShipToCompany\"].ToString();\n            consignee.Contact = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(batchDataRow[\"ShipToContact\"].ToString());\n            consignee.Address1 = batchDataRow[\"ShipToAddress1\"].ToString();\n            consignee.Address2 = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(batchDataRow[\"ShipToAddress2\"].ToString());\n            consignee.Address3 = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(batchDataRow[\"ShipToAddress3\"].ToString());\n            consignee.City = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(batchDataRow[\"ShipToCity\"].ToString());\n            consignee.StateProvince = batchDataRow[\"ShipToState\"].ToString();\n            consignee.PostalCode = batchDataRow[\"ShipToZipcode\"].ToString();\n            consignee.Country = batchDataRow[\"ShipToCountry\"].ToString();                              \n            consignee.Phone = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(batchDataRow[\"ShipToPhone\"].ToString());\n            return consignee;\n        }\n\n        private NameAddress SetShipFromData(DataRow batchDataRow)\n        {\n            NameAddress shipFromData = new NameAddress();         \n\n            shipFromData.Country = batchDataRow[\"ShipFromReturnCountry\"].ToString();\n            shipFromData.Company = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(batchDataRow[\"ShipFromReturnCompany\"].ToString());\n            shipFromData.Contact = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(batchDataRow[\"ShipFromReturnContact\"].ToString());\n            shipFromData.Address1 = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(batchDataRow[\"ShipFromReturnAddress1\"].ToString());\n            shipFromData.Address2 = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(batchDataRow[\"ShipFromReturnAddress2\"].ToString());\n            shipFromData.Address3 = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(batchDataRow[\"ShipFromReturnAddress3\"].ToString());\n            shipFromData.City = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(batchDataRow[\"ShipFromReturnCity\"].ToString());\n            shipFromData.StateProvince = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(batchDataRow[\"ShipFromReturnState\"].ToString());\n            shipFromData.PostalCode = Tools.RemoveSpecialCharacters(batchDataRow[\"ShipFromReturnZipcode\"].ToString());\n            shipFromData.Phone = batchDataRow[\"ShipFromReturnPhone\"].ToString();\n\n            return shipFromData;\n        }\n\n        private NameAddress SetThirdPartyData(DataRow batchDataRow)\n        {\n            NameAddress thirdPartyBillingData = new NameAddress();\n            thirdPartyBillingData.Company = batchDataRow[\"ChangeME\"].ToString();\n            thirdPartyBillingData.Address1 = batchDataRow[\"ChangeME\"].ToString();\n            thirdPartyBillingData.Address2 = batchDataRow[\"ChangeME\"].ToString();\n            thirdPartyBillingData.Address3 = batchDataRow[\"ChangeME\"].ToString();\n            thirdPartyBillingData.City = batchDataRow[\"ChangeME\"].ToString();\n            thirdPartyBillingData.StateProvince = batchDataRow[\"ChangeME\"].ToString();\n            thirdPartyBillingData.PostalCode = batchDataRow[\"ChangeME\"].ToString();\n            thirdPartyBillingData.Country = batchDataRow[\"ChangeME\"].ToString();\n            thirdPartyBillingData.Phone = batchDataRow[\"ChangeME\"].ToString();\n            return thirdPartyBillingData;\n        }\n\n        private ShipmentRequest SetPackageData(DataRow batchDataRow, ShipmentRequest shipRequest, SerializableDictionary Params, string batchReference, List<BusinessRuleSetting> BusinessRuleSettings, bool batchFile)\n        {\n            PackageRequest packageRequest = new PackageRequest();\n\n            SetDimensions(batchDataRow, packageRequest, Params, batchFile);\n            SetEmailNotification(batchDataRow, packageRequest);\n            SetPackageWeight(batchDataRow, packageRequest, Params, batchFile, batchReference);\n            SetReferenceFields(shipRequest, batchDataRow, Params, batchReference, packageRequest);\n            SetAccessorials(batchDataRow, packageRequest);\n\n            if (shipRequest.PackageDefaults.Consignee.Country != \"US\" && packageRequest.DocumentsOnly != true)\n            {\n                SetCommodityContents(shipRequest, packageRequest, batchDataRow, BusinessRuleSettings);\n            }\n\n            if (shipRequest.Packages == null)\n                shipRequest.Packages = new List<PackageRequest>();\n\n            shipRequest.Packages.Add(packageRequest);\n            return shipRequest;\n        }\n\n        private void SetPackageWeight(DataRow batchDataRow, PackageRequest packageRequest, SerializableDictionary userParams, bool batchFile, string batchReference)\n        {\n            packageRequest.Weight = Tools.ConvertToWeightObj(batchDataRow[\"PackageWeight\"].ToString().Trim());\n\n            if (packageRequest.Weight.Amount == 0)\n            {\n                Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Error, \"Batch did not have a wieght greater than 0 for batch \" + batchReference);\n                throw new Exception(\"ERROR... You did not provide a WEIGHT for your batch \" + batchReference + \". Please provide a weight and try again.\");\n            }\n        }\n\n        private void SetAccessorials(DataRow batchDataRow, PackageRequest packageRequest)\n        {\n            packageRequest.Packaging = batchDataRow[\"Packaging\"].ToString();\n            packageRequest.Proof = Tools.ConvertToBool(batchDataRow[\"ProofRequireSignature\"].ToString());\n            packageRequest.ProofRequireSignature = Tools.ConvertToBool(batchDataRow[\"ProofRequireSignature\"].ToString());\n            packageRequest.SaturdayDelivery = Tools.ConvertToBool(batchDataRow[\"SaturdayDelivery\"].ToString());\n            packageRequest.DocumentsOnly = Tools.ConvertToBool(batchDataRow[\"DocumentsOnly\"].ToString());\n            packageRequest.Description = batchDataRow[\"Description\"].ToString();\n        }\n\n        private void SetCommodityContents(ShipmentRequest shipRequest, PackageRequest packageRequest, DataRow batchDataRow, List<BusinessRuleSetting> BusinessRuleSettings)\n        {\n            for (int i = 1; i < 6; i++)\n            {\n                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(batchDataRow[\"Item\" + i + \"ProductCode\"].ToString()))\n                {\n                    CommodityContent commodities = new CommodityContent();\n                    commodities.ProductCode = batchDataRow[\"Item\" + i + \"ProductCode\"].ToString();\n                    commodities.Description = batchDataRow[\"Item\" + i + \"Description\"].ToString();\n                    commodities.OriginCountry = batchDataRow[\"Item\" + i + \"OriginCountry\"].ToString();\n                    commodities.Quantity = Tools.ConvertStringToLong(batchDataRow[\"Item\" + i + \"Quantity\"].ToString());\n                    commodities.UnitValue = Tools.ConvertToMoneyObj(batchDataRow[\"Item\" + i + \"UnitValue\"].ToString());\n                    commodities.UnitWeight = Tools.ConvertToWeightObj(batchDataRow[\"Item\" + i + \"UnitWeight\"].ToString());\n                    commodities.QuantityUnitMeasure = \"PCS\";\n\n                    if (packageRequest.CommodityContents == null)\n                        packageRequest.CommodityContents = new List<CommodityContent>();\n\n                    packageRequest.CommodityContents.Add(commodities);\n                }\n            }\n\n            if (packageRequest.CommodityContents == null)\n            {\n                Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Error, \"ERROR... In SetCommodityContents no commodity data was found in the batch file for ship to address \" + batchDataRow[\"ShipToAddress1\"].ToString());\n            }   \n        }\n\n        private void SetDimensions(DataRow batchDataRow, PackageRequest packageRequest, SerializableDictionary userParams, bool batchFile)\n        {\n            Dimensions dimensions = new Dimensions();\n            dimensions.Length = Tools.ConvertStringToDouble(batchDataRow[\"Length\"].ToString());\n            dimensions.Width = Tools.ConvertStringToDouble(batchDataRow[\"Width\"].ToString());\n            dimensions.Height = Tools.ConvertStringToDouble(batchDataRow[\"Height\"].ToString());\n            packageRequest.Dimensions = dimensions;\n        }\n\n        private void SetReferenceFields(ShipmentRequest shipRequest, DataRow batchDataRow, SerializableDictionary Params, string batchReference, PackageRequest packageRequest)\n        {\n            packageRequest.ShipperReference = batchDataRow[\"ShipperReference\"].ToString();\n            packageRequest.ConsigneeReference = batchDataRow[\"ConsigneeReference\"].ToString();\n        }\n\n        private void SetUserData(PackageRequest pack, DataRow batchDataRow, SerializableDictionary Params, string batchReference, bool batchFile)\n        {\n        }\n\n        private void SetEmailNotification(DataRow batchDataRow, PackageRequest packageRequest)\n        {\n            if (Tools.IsEmailFormatValid(batchDataRow[\"EmailAddress\"].ToString()))\n            {\n                packageRequest.ShipNotificationEmail = true;\n                packageRequest.ShipNotificationAddressEmail = batchDataRow[\"EmailAddress\"].ToString();              \n            }\n        }\n\n        private void SetServiceType(DataRow batchDataRow, ShipmentRequest shipRequest, SerializableDictionary userParams, bool batchFile, string batchReference)\n        {\n            if (batchFile)\n            {\n                string serviceType = string.Empty;\n\n                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(serviceType))\n                    shipRequest.PackageDefaults.Service = Tools.TranslateServiceType(serviceType);\n                else\n                    shipRequest.PackageDefaults.Service = new Service { Symbol = batchDataRow[\"Service\"].ToString() };\n            }\n            else\n            {\n                shipRequest.PackageDefaults.Service = new Service { Symbol = batchDataRow[\"Service\"].ToString() };\n            }\n\n            if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(shipRequest.PackageDefaults.Service.Symbol))\n            {\n                Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Error, \"Batch record did not have a Service Type for batch \" + batchReference);\n                throw new Exception(\"ERROR... You did not provide a Carrier Service Type for batch \" + batchReference + \" please try again.\");\n            }\n        }\n\n        private void SetBillingTerms(DataRow batchDataRow, ShipmentRequest shipRequest)\n        {\n            shipRequest.PackageDefaults.Terms = \"SHIPPER\";\n        }\n\n        private string SplitUserFromEmailAddress(ClientContext clientContext)\n        {\n            string userName = string.Empty;\n\n            if (clientContext != null)\n            {\n                if (!string.IsNullOrEmpty(clientContext.User.UserName))\n                {\n                    if (clientContext.User.UserName.Contains('@'))\n                        return clientContext.User.UserName.Split('@')[0];\n                    Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Warning, \"Warning In SplitUserFromEmailAddress ClientContext username did not contain an @ and could not be parsed.\");\n                }\n                else\n                {\n                    Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Error, \"Error In SplitUserFromEmailAddress clientContext user name was null or empty. Could not get the user name.\");\n                }\n            }\n            else\n            {\n                Logger.Log(this, LogLevel.Error, \"Error In SplitUserFromEmailAddress could not parse email address as the ClientContext was null.\");\n            }\n\n            return userName;\n        }\n    }\n}\n"}]}

[SYSTEM]
You are a code repair agent. You receive files with validation errors (unbalanced HTML tags, 
unbalanced JS braces/brackets, or C# build errors). 

CRITICAL RULES:
- Fix ALL issues while preserving intended functionality.
- NEVER change C# method signatures in SoxBusinessRules.cs — they implement IBusinessObject and are immutable.
- All business logic belongs in a separate Manager class. SoxBusinessRules only delegates to it.
- Ensure all HTML tags are properly balanced (every <div> has </div>, etc.)
- Ensure all JS braces {}, parentheses (), and brackets [] are balanced.
- For C# build errors, fix the code so it compiles. Use correct types and parameter names.
- THINK HARD ABOUT TYPE MATCHING: The method signatures are the SOURCE OF TRUTH for types. If a signature says PackageRequest, use PackageRequest — NOT Package, NOT PackageInfo. If it says ShipmentRequest, use ShipmentRequest — NOT Shipment. Cross-reference EVERY type against the actual signatures.
- Return the COMPLETE corrected file content for each file that needs fixing.

Return ONLY valid JSON with this structure:
{
  "fixes": [
    { "file": "<relative path>", "fullContent": "<complete corrected file content>" }
  ]
}
Do NOT include markdown fences. Return ONLY the JSON object.
